mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tbl_member (email, passwd, user_name) VALUES (#{email}, #{passwd}, #{userName})
mapper.select: SELECT role_no, role_name, role_desc FROM tbl_role
SELECT r.role_no, r.role_name FROM tbl_member m INNER JOIN tbl_member_role mr ON m.email = mr.email INNER JOIN tbl_role r ON mr.role_no = r.role_no WHERE m.email = #{ email }
